mapper.select: select count(*) from crems_company where status = '1'
select count(*) from crems_job where status = '1'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_company) AS companyCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_company WHERE status = '1') AS certifiedCompanyCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_student) AS studentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_job) AS jobCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_job WHERE status = '1') AS publishedJobCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_application) AS applicationCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crems_interview) AS interviewCount
select job_type as groupName, count(*) as jobCount from crems_job where job_type is not null and job_type != '' group by job_type
select work_city as groupName, count(*) as jobCount from crems_job where work_city is not null and work_city != '' group by work_city order by jobCount desc limit 20

select c.industry as groupName, count(j.job_id) as jobCount from crems_job j left join crems_company c on j.company_id = c.company_id where c.industry is not null and c.industry != '' group by c.industry
select status as groupName, count(*) as applicationCount from crems_application group by status
select interview_type as groupName, count(*) as interviewCount from crems_interview where interview_type is not null and interview_type != '' group by interview_type
select interview_result as groupName, count(*) as interviewCount from crems_interview where interview_result is not null and interview_result != '' group by interview_result
